task.goal: Control the two-joint arm so the fingertip reaches the target.
task.success_condition: A successful episode reaches a total score of at least -5 over the 50 step episode.
task.reward_description: The environment penalizes fingertip distance to the target and control effort. Returns are usually negative; higher total return is better.
notes: This is a MuJoCo telemetry task with a short horizon and continuous torque actions.
The policy receives the official Reacher state vector, including joint angle features, target position, joint velocities, and fingertip-to-target displacement.
The target changes with the environment seed.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive a conservative low score.

observation_meanings.name: cos_shoulder_angle
observation_meanings.meaning: Cosine of the first joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: cos_elbow_angle
observation_meanings.meaning: Cosine of the second joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: sin_shoulder_angle
observation_meanings.meaning: Sine of the first joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: sin_elbow_angle
observation_meanings.meaning: Sine of the second joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: fingertip_to_target_x
observation_meanings.meaning: Horizontal displacement from fingertip to target.

observation_meanings.name: fingertip_to_target_y
observation_meanings.meaning: Vertical displacement from fingertip to target.

action_meanings.name: shoulder_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the first joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: elbow_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the second joint in [-1, 1].
